rationale: The citing paper references Kanninen (2002) only in a grouped introductory citation listing prior work on improving conjoint choice design efficiency. The paper does not discuss Kanninen's specific model, derivations, or findings, and it does not use that paper as a direct baseline in its theoretical development or simulation design. Core methodological development and comparisons are framed mainly against the authors' own prior Bayesian and mixed logit design work and a few other explicitly discussed streams.
